svg.aria-label: Trail: Why Knowledge Should Compile, Not Just Search — RAG searches and forgets; Trail compiles and remembers
svg.text: TRAIL: WHY KNOWLEDGE SHOULD COMPILE, NOT JUST SEARCH

g.text: SEARCH ACCURACY DEGRADES AS DATA GROWS
BECOMES SUPERLINEARLY SMARTER AS IT GROWS

svg.text: RAG searches and forgets · Trail compiles and remembers · knowledge compounds with every ingest
